name: I'm on top of a small hill
description: I'm on top of a small hill
hints: You're atop the hill with a sleeping pirate and a narrow crack in the rock. Don't wake the pirate carelessly.
The crack leads underground into a cavern system. The pirate is sleeping - should you wake him or sneak past?
GO CRACK enters the cavern below (room 8) but sets flags that affect later gameplay. JUMP LEDGE gets you back to the ledge safely. Plain JUMP is fatal.
GO CRACK to enter the cavern (room 8). Be warned: returning through the crack from the cavern side is FATAL. JUMP LEDGE safely returns to the ledge (room 6). DOWN leads to room 10 (a joke room).
notes: Hilltop with a sleeping pirate and a crack in the rock. GO CRACK enters cavern (room 8) and sets flags 3 and 16. JUMP LEDGE returns to ledge (room 6) with a fall message but safely. Plain JUMP is FATAL. GO HILL says 'Sorry, I am' (already on hill). DOWN goes to room 10 (joke referencing Adventure #2). The sleeping pirate may be interacted with using WAKE.
